keywordspec.name: lge.auto.TDT
keywordspec.doc: The TDT class can perform HW function testing. This class is used in the SW development stage and DQA verification stage, and the protocol used in the TDT class is also used in process inspection technology.

kw.name: Add Uart Port
kw.doc:
Connect to HW using the serial port. argument: - ``port`` : HW Serial Port Number (e.g: COM14) - ``bps`` : BPS (e.g: 115200)
Examples: | `Add Uart Port` | | `Add Uart Port` | COM14 | 115200 |
kw.shortdoc: Connect to HW using the serial port. argument: - ``port`` : HW Serial Port Number (e.g: COM14) - ``bps`` : BPS (e.g: 115200)

kw.name: Close Uart Port
kw.doc:
Terminate the thread for reading the response and disconnect the serial port.
argument: None
Examples: | `Close Uart Port` |
kw.shortdoc: Terminate the thread for reading the response and disconnect the serial port.

kw.name: Import XML
kw.doc:
Parse the XML file and check request data and response data. argument: - ``xml_file`` : xml file path
Examples: | `Import XML` | COM14 |
kw.shortdoc: Parse the XML file and check request data and response data. argument: - ``xml_file`` : xml file path

arguments.repr: command_type, debug, module_code, function_code, function_code_2, result_code, user_data_len, user_data

kw.name: Result Analysis
kw.doc:
Compare response data and expected data
argument: - ``compare_type`` : - COMPARE_NONE = 0 - COMPARE_EQUAL = 1 - COPRE_NOT_EQUAL = 2 - COMPARE_LESS_THAN = 3 - COMPARE_GREATER_THAN = 4 - COMPARE_LESS_OR_EQUAL = 5 - COMPARE_GREATER_OR_EQUAL = 6 - COMPARE_CONTAIN = 7
Examples: | `Result Analysis` | COMPARE_NONE /
kw.shortdoc: Compare response data and expected data

kw.name: Run Test
kw.doc:
Send request message and read response message argument:
Examples: | `Run Test` |
kw.shortdoc: Send request message and read response message argument:
